all.en: I had just downloaded a new dating app last weekend out of curiosity.
all.zh: 上個週末我出於好奇剛下載了一款新的交友軟體。

all.en: After swiping for an hour, I finally matched with someone named Daniel.
all.zh: 滑了一小時後，我終於和一位叫丹尼爾的人配對成功。

all.en: His profile said he loved hiking, jazz music, and homemade pasta.
all.zh: 他的個人檔案寫著他熱愛健行、爵士樂和手工義大利麵。

all.en: I sent him a simple hello and asked about his favorite trail.
all.zh: 我傳了一句簡單的哈囉，並問他最喜歡的健行路線。

all.en: He replied within minutes, which made me feel more confident.
all.zh: 他幾分鐘內就回覆了，讓我覺得更有信心。

all.en: We chatted about our hometowns and our jobs for almost two hours.
all.zh: 我們聊了將近兩個小時，談到家鄉和工作。

all.en: He seemed polite, funny, and not too eager to ask for personal details.
all.zh: 他似乎有禮貌又風趣，也沒有急著問私人細節。

all.en: At the end, he suggested grabbing coffee at a quiet café downtown.
all.zh: 最後他提議去市中心一家安靜的咖啡廳喝杯咖啡。

all.en: I said yes but chose a public place to feel safe.
all.zh: 我答應了，但選了一個公共場所讓自己比較安心。

all.en: After we said goodnight, I sat smiling at my phone for a while.
all.zh: 互道晚安後，我對著手機微笑了好一陣子。

all.en: Maybe online dating was not as scary as I had imagined.
all.zh: 也許網路交友並沒有我想像中那麼可怕。
